hero.title:
Online school
with neuro-approach
hero.description: Individual lessons and mini-groups for children, teenagers, and adults. We consider the specifics of memory, attention, and perception to make learning truly effective.

about.title: Our mission
about.subtitle: Mission Statement
paragraphs: Fluent Mind is a school where a team of professionals helps people unlock their learning potential with care, attention, and an understanding of how the human brain works.

We create a safe learning environment that takes into account each student's individual characteristics. Our neuro-friendly approach allows us to effectively work with different types of information perception, memory, and attention.
We believe that everyone can succeed in learning when education is adapted to their unique needs and thinking patterns.
about.quote: Learning should be caring, attentive, and based on an understanding of how each person's brain works.

items.name: Anastasia Dulich
items.description: Neuropedagogue and polyglot with over 20 years of experience.

reviews.author: Maria
reviews.text: Excellent teacher! Anastasia helped me speak English with confidence.

reviews.author: Dmitry
reviews.text: Prepared for my job interview in 2 months. Very grateful for the individual approach.

courses.title: Our courses
courses.subtitle: Choose the right learning format
courses.description: We offer various learning formats adapted to your needs and perception characteristics.

items.title: Individual lessons
items.subtitle: Personal approach
items.description: One-on-one lessons with a teacher. A fully customized program tailored to your goals and needs.

items.title: Mini-groups
items.subtitle: Small group learning
items.description: Classes in small groups of up to 4 people. A balance between individual approach and group dynamics.

items.title: Specialized programs
items.subtitle: For work, exams, or interviews
items.description: Our specialists create individual programs for exam preparation, job interviews, or professional vocabulary

careers.title: Careers at Fluent Mind
careers.subtitle: Join our team
careers.description: We are looking for talented teachers who share our approach to neuro-friendly education. If you are passionate about languages and want to help people achieve their goals, we would love to meet you.

openPositions.title: Open positions
openPositions.noPositions: We currently have no open positions, but we are always happy to review your resume.

application.title: Submit your resume
application.description: Send us your resume and tell us about yourself. We will contact you if a suitable position becomes available.

form.name: Your name
